// File: InsuranceIntegrationTest.js
// Path: backend/tests/insurance/InsuranceIntegrationTest.js
// @file InsuranceIntegrationTest.js
// @path backend/tests/insurance/InsuranceIntegrationTest.js
// @description Full integration tests for AI metrics, risk scoring, and claim/policy endpoints in CFH Insurance role — Rivers Auction May 08, 2025 Test Prep Coverage Suite.
// @author Cod2 - May 09, 2025, 16:57 PDT

import supertest from 'supertest';
import app from '@backend/app';
import * as InsuranceQuoteAnalyzer from '@utils/insurance/InsuranceQuoteAnalyzer';
import * as InsurancePolicy from '@models/insurance/InsurancePolicy';

jest.mock('@utils/insurance/InsuranceQuoteAnalyzer');
jest.mock('@models/insurance/InsurancePolicy');

const request = supertest(app);

beforeEach(() => {
  jest.clearAllMocks();
});

describe('📊 /ai/performance — AI Model Metrics', () => {
  it('returns performance metrics for premium user (last_30_days)', async () => {
    const mockMetrics = {
      accuracy: 91.2,
      precision: 87.6,
      recall: 84.3,
      f1Score: 85.9,
      confusionMatrix: [[10, 2], [1, 7]],
      dataTestId: 'model-performance'
    };
    InsurancePolicy.getModelPerformance = jest.fn().mockResolvedValue(mockMetrics);

    const res = await request.get('/ai/performance?timeframe=last_30_days');
    expect(res.statusCode).toBe(200);
    expect(res.body.dataTestId).toBe('model-performance');
    expect(res.body.accuracy).toBeGreaterThan(90);
  });

  it('returns 403 for non-premium user', async () => {
    InsurancePolicy.getModelPerformance = jest.fn().mockImplementation(() => {
      const err = new Error('Forbidden');
      err.status = 403;
      throw err;
    });

    const res = await request.get('/ai/performance?timeframe=last_90_days');
    expect(res.statusCode).toBe(403);
  });

  it('returns 400 for invalid timeframe', async () => {
    const res = await request.get('/ai/performance?timeframe=invalid_range');
    expect(res.statusCode).toBe(400);
  });
});

describe('🧠 /claims/:id/risk — Risk Scoring', () => {
  it('returns risk score for valid claim ID (premium)', async () => {
    InsuranceQuoteAnalyzer.predictClaimLikelihood = jest.fn().mockResolvedValue({
      riskScore: 73,
      dataTestId: 'claim-risk'
    });

    const res = await request.get('/claims/abc123/risk');
    expect(res.statusCode).toBe(200);
    expect(res.body.riskScore).toBeDefined();
    expect(res.body.dataTestId).toBe('claim-risk');
  });

  it('returns 403 for non-premium user', async () => {
    InsuranceQuoteAnalyzer.predictClaimLikelihood = jest.fn().mockImplementation(() => {
      const err = new Error('Forbidden');
      err.status = 403;
      throw err;
    });

    const res = await request.get('/claims/abc456/risk');
    expect(res.statusCode).toBe(403);
  });

  it('returns 400 for invalid claim ID', async () => {
    const res = await request.get('/claims/!@#invalid/risk');
    expect(res.statusCode).toBe(400);
  });

  it('calls predictClaimLikelihood internally', async () => {
    const spy = jest.spyOn(InsuranceQuoteAnalyzer, 'predictClaimLikelihood');
    spy.mockResolvedValue({ riskScore: 61 });

    await request.get('/claims/test123/risk');
    expect(spy).toHaveBeenCalledWith('test123');
  });
});

describe('📥 /claims and /policies — Existing Routes', () => {
  it('creates a new claim (POST /claims)', async () => {
    const res = await request
      .post('/claims')
      .send({ policyId: 'p001', damageEstimate: 5000 });
    expect([200, 201]).toContain(res.statusCode);
  });

  it('fetches policy by ID (GET /policies/:id)', async () => {
    const res = await request.get('/policies/p001');
    expect(res.statusCode).toBe(200);
    expect(res.body).toBeDefined();
  });
});

// File: InsuranceIntegrationTest.js
// Path: backend/tests/insurance/InsuranceIntegrationTest.js
// @file InsuranceIntegrationTest.js
// @path backend/tests/insurance/InsuranceIntegrationTest.js
// @description Full integration test suite for CFH Insurance AI endpoints and legacy claim/policy routes — Rivers Auction Test Prep, May 08, 2025. Includes AI performance, risk scoring, and validation scenarios across premium and non-premium roles. All test routes include mock isolation, data-testid checks, and response status coverage. Compatible with InsuranceOfficerDashboard.test.jsx (artifact_id: 00145da2-6169-46d6-b990-8726c222dc2e). Crown Certified standard compliance ensured on May 09, 2025, 16:59 PDT.
// @author Cod2 - May 09, 2025, 16:59 PDT

import supertest from 'supertest';
import http from 'http';
import app from '@backend/app';
import * as InsuranceQuoteAnalyzer from '@utils/insurance/InsuranceQuoteAnalyzer';
import * as InsurancePolicy from '@models/insurance/InsurancePolicy';

jest.mock('@utils/insurance/InsuranceQuoteAnalyzer');
jest.mock('@models/insurance/InsurancePolicy');

let server;
const request = supertest(app);

beforeAll((done) => {
  server = http.createServer(app);
  server.listen(done);
});

afterAll((done) => {
  server.close(done);
});

beforeEach(() => {
  jest.clearAllMocks();
});

describe('📊 /ai/performance — AI Metrics', () => {
  it('returns premium metrics with data-testid', async () => {
    InsurancePolicy.getModelPerformance = jest.fn().mockResolvedValue({
      accuracy: 93.4,
      precision: 89.0,
      recall: 85.2,
      f1Score: 86.8,
      confusionMatrix: [[15, 3], [2, 10]],
      dataTestId: 'model-performance'
    });

    const res = await request.get('/ai/performance?timeframe=last_30_days');
    expect(res.statusCode).toBe(200);
    expect(res.body.dataTestId).toBe('model-performance');
    expect(res.body.confusionMatrix.length).toBe(2);
  });

  it('returns 403 for non-premium access', async () => {
    InsurancePolicy.getModelPerformance = jest.fn(() => {
      const err = new Error('Forbidden');
      err.status = 403;
      throw err;
    });

    const res = await request.get('/ai/performance?timeframe=last_30_days');
    expect(res.statusCode).toBe(403);
  });

  it('returns 400 for invalid timeframe', async () => {
    const res = await request.get('/ai/performance?timeframe=not_valid');
    expect(res.statusCode).toBe(400);
  });
});

describe('🧠 /claims/:id/risk — Risk Scoring', () => {
  it('returns risk score with test metadata', async () => {
    InsuranceQuoteAnalyzer.predictClaimLikelihood = jest.fn().mockResolvedValue({
      riskScore: 74,
      dataTestId: 'claim-risk'
    });

    const res = await request.get('/claims/test-001/risk');
    expect(res.statusCode).toBe(200);
    expect(res.body.riskScore).toBeDefined();
    expect(res.body.dataTestId).toBe('claim-risk');
  });

  it('returns 403 for non-premium users', async () => {
    InsuranceQuoteAnalyzer.predictClaimLikelihood = jest.fn(() => {
      const err = new Error('Forbidden');
      err.status = 403;
      throw err;
    });

    const res = await request.get('/claims/test-002/risk');
    expect(res.statusCode).toBe(403);
  });

  it('returns 400 for invalid ID', async () => {
    const res = await request.get('/claims/!@#/risk');
    expect(res.statusCode).toBe(400);
  });

  it('calls InsuranceQuoteAnalyzer.predictClaimLikelihood', async () => {
    const spy = jest.spyOn(InsuranceQuoteAnalyzer, 'predictClaimLikelihood');
    spy.mockResolvedValue({ riskScore: 70 });
    await request.get('/claims/mock-id/risk');
    expect(spy).toHaveBeenCalledWith('mock-id');
  });
});

describe('📥 Legacy Claims/Policies Routes', () => {
  it('submits a claim (POST /claims)', async () => {
    const res = await request.post('/claims').send({
      policyId: 'CFH-P1001',
      estimate: 4000
    });
    expect([200, 201]).toContain(res.statusCode);
  });

  it('fetches a policy by ID (GET /policies/:id)', async () => {
    const res = await request.get('/policies/CFH-P1001');
    expect(res.statusCode).toBe(200);
    expect(res.body).toBeDefined();
  });
});

here is what Cod2 said:
[// File: AuctionIntelligenceDashboard.jsx
// Path: frontend/src/components/auction/AuctionIntelligenceDashboard.jsx
// @file AuctionIntelligenceDashboard.jsx
// @path frontend/src/components/auction/AuctionIntelligenceDashboard.jsx
// @description Auction analytics and premium bidding insights dashboard for CFH Auction role — Rivers Auction May 08, 2025 Test Prep Component.
// @component AuctionIntelligenceDashboard
// @author Cod2 - May 09, 2025, 17:10 PDT
// @wow Interactive auction analytics visualizations and AI-powered bidding predictions for premium users

import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { Line, Bar } from 'react-chartjs-2';
import PremiumFeature from '@components/common/PremiumFeature';
import ToastManager from '@components/common/ToastManager';
import styles from '@styles/AuctionIntelligenceDashboard.css';

const AuctionIntelligenceDashboard = () => {
  const [analytics, setAnalytics] = useState(null);
  const [timeframe, setTimeframe] = useState('last_7_days');
  const [category, setCategory] = useState('vehicles');
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);

  const fetchAnalytics = async () => {
    try {
      setLoading(true);
      const res = await fetch(`/auctions/analytics?timeframe=${timeframe}&category=${category}`);
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error('Failed to load auction analytics');
      const data = await res.json();
      setAnalytics(data);
    } catch (err) {
      ToastManager.error(err.message);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchAnalytics();
    const interval = setInterval(() => {
      if (!document.hidden) fetchAnalytics();
    }, 15000);
    return () => clearInterval(interval);
  }, [timeframe, category]);

  const renderLineChart = () => (
    <Line
      data={analytics?.bidTrends || {}}
      options={{ responsive: true }}
      aria-label="Bid Trends Line Chart"
      role="img"
      data-testid="bid-trends-chart"
    />
  );

  const renderBarChart = () => (
    <Bar
      data={analytics?.winRates || {}}
      options={{ responsive: true }}
      aria-label="Win Rate Bar Chart"
      role="img"
      data-testid="win-rate-chart"
    />
  );

  return (
    <div className={styles.dashboard} aria-label="Auction Intelligence Dashboard" role="region">
      <div className={styles.controls}>
        <select value={timeframe} onChange={e => setTimeframe(e.target.value)} aria-label="Timeframe Filter" data-testid="timeframe-dropdown">
          <option value="last_7_days">Last 7 Days</option>
          <option value="last_30_days">Last 30 Days</option>
        </select>
        <select value={category} onChange={e => setCategory(e.target.value)} aria-label="Category Filter" data-testid="category-dropdown">
          <option value="vehicles">Vehicles</option>
          <option value="equipment">Equipment</option>
        </select>
      </div>

      {loading && <p data-testid="loading-text">Loading auction analytics...</p>}
      {!loading && analytics && (
        <>
          <section className={styles.chartSection}>{renderLineChart()}</section>
          <section className={styles.chartSection}>{renderBarChart()}</section>
          <PremiumFeature flag="aiAuctionInsights">
            <section className={styles.premiumInsights} aria-label="AI Predictions Panel" role="complementary" data-testid="ai-predictions-panel">
              <h3>Predicted Winning Bids (AI)</h3>
              <ul>
                {analytics.predictedWinningBids?.map((bid, idx) => (
                  <li key={idx}>{`${bid.item}: $${bid.amount}`}</li>
                ))}
              </ul>
            </section>
          </PremiumFeature>
        </>
      )}
    </div>
  );
};

export default AuctionIntelligenceDashboard;
✅ Highlights:
📈 Line + Bar charts via react-chartjs-2

🧠 AI bidding predictions (PremiumFeature gated)

🕐 Real-time refresh via setInterval + !document.hidden

📊 Accessible, testable components with aria-label and data-testid

🔧 Endpoint ready: GET /auctions/analytics

Would you like me to follow up with the .test.jsx file next or move to the backend route for /auctions/analytics?

// File: AuctionIntelligenceDashboard.jsx
// Path: frontend/src/components/auction/AuctionIntelligenceDashboard.jsx
// @file AuctionIntelligenceDashboard.jsx
// @path frontend/src/components/auction/AuctionIntelligenceDashboard.jsx
// @description Auction analytics and AI-powered bidding insights dashboard for the CFH Auction role — Rivers Auction Test Prep, May 08, 2025.
// @component AuctionIntelligenceDashboard.jsx
// @wow Interactive auction analytics visualizations with real-time updates and premium AI bidding predictions.
// @author Cod2 - May 09, 2025, 17:16 PDT

import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import PropTypes from 'prop-types';
import { Line, Bar } from 'react-chartjs-2';
import {
  Chart as ChartJS,
  LineElement,
  BarElement,
  CategoryScale,
  LinearScale,
  PointElement,
  Title,
  Tooltip,
  Legend
} from 'chart.js';
import PremiumFeature from '@components/common/PremiumFeature';
import ToastManager from '@components/common/ToastManager';
import styles from '@styles/AuctionIntelligenceDashboard.css';

ChartJS.register(
  LineElement,
  BarElement,
  CategoryScale,
  LinearScale,
  PointElement,
  Title,
  Tooltip,
  Legend
);

const AuctionIntelligenceDashboard = ({ defaultTimeframe = 'last_7_days', defaultCategory = 'vehicles' }) => {
  const [analytics, setAnalytics] = useState(null);
  const [timeframe, setTimeframe] = useState(defaultTimeframe);
  const [category, setCategory] = useState(defaultCategory);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);

  const fetchAnalytics = async () => {
    try {
      setLoading(true);
      const res = await fetch(`/auctions/analytics?timeframe=${timeframe}&category=${category}`);
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error('Failed to load auction analytics');
      const data = await res.json();
      setAnalytics(data);
    } catch (err) {
      ToastManager.error(err.message);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchAnalytics();
    const interval = setInterval(() => {
      if (!document.hidden) fetchAnalytics();
    }, 15000);
    return () => clearInterval(interval);
  }, [timeframe, category]);

  const renderLineChart = () => (
    <Line
      data={analytics?.bidTrends || {}}
      options={{ responsive: true }}
      aria-label="Bid Trends Line Chart"
      role="img"
      data-testid="bid-trends-chart"
    />
  );

  const renderBarChart = () => (
    <Bar
      data={analytics?.winRates || {}}
      options={{ responsive: true }}
      aria-label="Win Rate Bar Chart"
      role="img"
      data-testid="win-rate-chart"
    />
  );

  return (
    <div className={styles.dashboard} aria-label="Auction Intelligence Dashboard" role="region">
      <div className={styles.controls}>
        <select value={timeframe} onChange={e => setTimeframe(e.target.value)} aria-label="Timeframe Filter" data-testid="timeframe-dropdown">
          <option value="last_7_days">Last 7 Days</option>
          <option value="last_30_days">Last 30 Days</option>
        </select>
        <select value={category} onChange={e => setCategory(e.target.value)} aria-label="Category Filter" data-testid="category-dropdown">
          <option value="vehicles">Vehicles</option>
          <option value="equipment">Equipment</option>
        </select>
      </div>

      {loading && <p data-testid="loading-text">Loading auction analytics...</p>}
      {!loading && analytics && (
        <>
          <section className={styles.chartSection}>{renderLineChart()}</section>
          <section className={styles.chartSection}>{renderBarChart()}</section>
          <PremiumFeature flag="aiAuctionInsights">
            <section className={styles.premiumInsights} aria-label="AI Predictions Panel" role="complementary" data-testid="ai-predictions-panel">
              <h3>Predicted Winning Bids (AI)</h3>
              <ul>
                {analytics.predictedWinningBids?.map((bid, idx) => (
                  <li key={idx}>{`${bid.item}: $${bid.amount}`}</li>
                ))}
              </ul>
            </section>
          </PremiumFeature>
        </>
      )}
    </div>
  );
};

AuctionIntelligenceDashboard.propTypes = {
  defaultTimeframe: PropTypes.string,
  defaultCategory: PropTypes.string
};

export default AuctionIntelligenceDashboard;

// File: AuctionIntelligenceDashboard.test.jsx
// Path: frontend/src/tests/auction/AuctionIntelligenceDashboard.test.jsx
// @file AuctionIntelligenceDashboard.test.jsx
// @path frontend/src/tests/auction/AuctionIntelligenceDashboard.test.jsx
// @description Tests interactive auction analytics and AI insights for premium users.
// @wow Covers real-time polling, visualizations, premium gating, and error handling.
// @author Cod2 - May 08, 2025, 17:44 PDT

import React from 'react';
import { render, screen, waitFor, act } from '@testing-library/react';
import '@testing-library/jest-dom';
import AuctionIntelligenceDashboard from '@components/auction/AuctionIntelligenceDashboard';
import PremiumFeature from '@components/common/PremiumFeature';
import ToastManager from '@components/common/ToastManager';
import * as chartjs from 'react-chartjs-2';

// Mocks
jest.mock('@components/common/ToastManager', () => ({
  error: jest.fn(),
}));

jest.mock('react-chartjs-2', () => ({
  Line: jest.fn(() => <div data-testid="line-chart" />),
  Bar: jest.fn(() => <div data-testid="bar-chart" />),
}));

jest.mock('@components/common/PremiumFeature', () => ({ children }) => (
  <div data-testid="premium-section">{children}</div>
));

describe('AuctionIntelligenceDashboard', () => {
  let originalFetch;

  beforeEach(() => {
    jest.useFakeTimers();
    originalFetch = global.fetch;
    global.fetch = jest.fn(() =>
      Promise.resolve({
        ok: true,
        json: () =>
          Promise.resolve({
            bidTrends: [100, 120, 140],
            winRates: [50, 60, 65],
            predictedBid: 180,
          }),
      })
    );
  });

  afterEach(() => {
    jest.runOnlyPendingTimers();
    jest.useRealTimers();
    global.fetch = originalFetch;
    jest.clearAllMocks();
  });

  test('renders line and bar charts with analytics data', async () => {
    render(<AuctionIntelligenceDashboard />);
    await waitFor(() => {
      expect(screen.getByTestId('line-chart')).toBeInTheDocument();
      expect(screen.getByTestId('bar-chart')).toBeInTheDocument();
    });
  });

  test('displays premium AI predictions section', async () => {
    render(<AuctionIntelligenceDashboard />);
    expect(screen.getByTestId('premium-section')).toBeInTheDocument();
  });

  test('polls every 15 seconds if document is visible', async () => {
    render(<AuctionIntelligenceDashboard />);
    expect(fetch).toHaveBeenCalledTimes(1);

    act(() => {
      jest.advanceTimersByTime(15000);
    });

    await waitFor(() => {
      expect(fetch).toHaveBeenCalledTimes(2);
    });
  });

  test('handles API errors gracefully', async () => {
    global.fetch = jest.fn(() => Promise.resolve({ ok: false }));
    render(<AuctionIntelligenceDashboard />);
    await waitFor(() => {
      expect(ToastManager.error).toHaveBeenCalledWith('Failed to load auction analytics');
    });
  });
});

// File: AuctionIntelligenceDashboard.test.jsx
// Path: frontend/src/tests/auction/AuctionIntelligenceDashboard.test.jsx
// @file AuctionIntelligenceDashboard.test.jsx
// @path frontend/src/tests/auction/AuctionIntelligenceDashboard.test.jsx
// @description Tests interactive auction analytics and AI insights for premium users and non-premium fallback
// @wow Covers real-time polling, visualizations, premium gating, error handling, and filtering logic.
// @author Cod2 - May 08, 2025, 17:47 PDT

import React from 'react';
import { render, screen, waitFor, act, fireEvent } from '@testing-library/react';
import '@testing-library/jest-dom';
import AuctionIntelligenceDashboard from '@components/auction/AuctionIntelligenceDashboard';
import ToastManager from '@components/common/ToastManager';
import * as chartjs from 'react-chartjs-2';

// Mocks
jest.mock('@components/common/ToastManager', () => ({
  error: jest.fn(),
}));

jest.mock('react-chartjs-2', () => ({
  Line: jest.fn(() => <div data-testid="line-chart" />),
  Bar: jest.fn(() => <div data-testid="bar-chart" />),
}));

describe('AuctionIntelligenceDashboard - Premium User', () => {
  let originalFetch;

  beforeEach(() => {
    jest.useFakeTimers();
    originalFetch = global.fetch;
    global.fetch = jest.fn((url) =>
      Promise.resolve({
        ok: true,
        json: () =>
          Promise.resolve({
            bidTrends: [100, 120, 140],
            winRates: [50, 60, 65],
            predictedBid: 180,
          }),
      })
    );

    jest.mock('@components/common/PremiumFeature', () => ({ children }) => (
      <div data-testid="premium-section">{children}</div>
    ));
  });

  afterEach(() => {
    jest.runOnlyPendingTimers();
    jest.useRealTimers();
    global.fetch = originalFetch;
    jest.clearAllMocks();
  });

  test('renders charts and premium section', async () => {
    render(<AuctionIntelligenceDashboard />);
    await waitFor(() => {
      expect(screen.getByTestId('line-chart')).toBeInTheDocument();
      expect(screen.getByTestId('bar-chart')).toBeInTheDocument();
      expect(screen.getByTestId('premium-section')).toBeInTheDocument();
    });
  });

  test('polls every 15 seconds when document is visible', async () => {
    render(<AuctionIntelligenceDashboard />);
    expect(fetch).toHaveBeenCalledTimes(1);
    act(() => {
      jest.advanceTimersByTime(15000);
    });
    await waitFor(() => {
      expect(fetch).toHaveBeenCalledTimes(2);
    });
  });

  test('filters analytics by timeframe/category', async () => {
    render(<AuctionIntelligenceDashboard />);
    const select = screen.getByLabelText(/Timeframe/i);
    fireEvent.change(select, { target: { value: 'last_90_days' } });

    await waitFor(() => {
      expect(fetch).toHaveBeenCalledWith(expect.stringContaining('timeframe=last_90_days'), expect.any(Object));
    });
  });

  test('handles API failure', async () => {
    global.fetch = jest.fn(() => Promise.resolve({ ok: false }));
    render(<AuctionIntelligenceDashboard />);
    await waitFor(() => {
      expect(ToastManager.error).toHaveBeenCalledWith('Failed to load auction analytics');
    });
  });
});

describe('AuctionIntelligenceDashboard - Non-Premium User', () => {
  beforeEach(() => {
    jest.mock('@components/common/PremiumFeature', () => () => null);
  });

  afterEach(() => {
    jest.clearAllMocks();
  });

  test('hides premium insights for non-premium users', async () => {
    render(<AuctionIntelligenceDashboard />);
    expect(screen.queryByTestId('premium-section')).not.toBeInTheDocument();
  });
});
✅ Ready for review.

Here is the Crown Certified backend controller file:

✅ AuctionAnalyticsController.js
Path: backend/controllers/auction/AuctionAnalyticsController.js
📅 Timestamp: @timestamp Cod2 - May 08, 2025, 18:09 PDT

js
Copy
Edit
// File: AuctionAnalyticsController.js
// Path: backend/controllers/auction/AuctionAnalyticsController.js
// @file AuctionAnalyticsController.js
// @path backend/controllers/auction/AuctionAnalyticsController.js
// @description Controller for auction analytics and AI-driven bidding insights
// @wow Provides dynamic auction metrics and premium-only AI predictions
// @timestamp Cod2 - May 08, 2025, 18:09 PDT

import Joi from 'joi';
import Auction from '@models/auction/Auction';
import AIInsightEngine from '@utils/auction/AIInsightEngine';

/**
 * @function getAnalytics
 * @description Handles GET /auctions/analytics and returns auction analytics based on timeframe and category
 * @wow Includes AI bidding insights for premium users only
 */
export const getAnalytics = async (req, res) => {
  const { timeframe = 'last_30_days', category = 'vehicles' } = req.query;
  const user = req.user || {}; // Premium info injected via middleware

  const schema = Joi.object({
    timeframe: Joi.string().valid('last_7_days', 'last_30_days', 'last_90_days').required(),
    category: Joi.string().required(),
  });

  const { error } = schema.validate({ timeframe, category });
  if (error) {
    return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Invalid timeframe or category' });
  }

  try {
    // Simulated analytics data (replace with real aggregation logic)
    const analytics = {
      bidTrends: [100, 120, 140],
      winRates: [50, 60, 65],
      averageBid: 130,
    };

    // Append AI insights if premium
    if (user.isPremium) {
      analytics.predictedBid = AIInsightEngine.predictWinningBid(category, timeframe);
    }

    return res.status(200).json({
      dataTestId: 'auction-analytics',
      ...analytics,
    });
  } catch (err) {
    console.error('[AuctionAnalyticsController]', err.message);
    return res.status(500).json({ error: 'Failed to fetch analytics' });
  }
};
✅ Ready for review.

**Prompt for Cod5 (Utils and Post-Launch Files)**:
```plaintext
Cod5, please develop the following utility and post-launch files for the auction system in the Rivers Auction platform to support exporting analytics and future moderation features. Ensure all changes support equity financing workflows where buyers secure loans based on equity, down payment, and agreed monthly payments, with FICA scores only used if opted into, and investors bid on equity-only loans without pursuing buyers to destroy their credit. Follow the Crown Certified Standards: use California military time (e.g., 06050000 for May 6, 00:00 AM), in-line and section comments, @ aliased imports, premium flag support, modular design, named exports, functional React components with hooks (if applicable), and Jest testing standards. Include a "Functions Summary" section after each code block listing the file’s key functions, their purposes, and key details (inputs, outputs, dependencies). Save the files to the specified directories. Include the current date and time in **California** using **military time format (HHMM)** (e.g., 06050000 for May 6, 00:00 AM). Follow these requirements:

1. **auctionExportUtils.js**:
   - **File**: auctionExportUtils.js
   - **Path**: backend/utils/exportUtils/auctionExportUtils.js
   - **Author**: Cod5 (use current date/time, e.g., 06050000 if executed at May 06, 2025, 00:00 California time)
   - **Requirements**:
     - Build a backend utility to export analytics and bidding results to PDF, leveraging pdfExportService.js.
     - Include premium watermarking and AI annotations.
     - Add error handling and logging.
     - Functions:
       - `generateAuctionSummaryPDF(auctionId)`: Creates PDF summary.
       - `exportParticipantLeaderboard()`: Exports leaderboard data.
       - `addAIAnnotations()`: Adds AI insights to PDF.
       - `integrateWithPDFExportService()`: Uses pdfExportService.js for PDF generation.
       - **New**: `handleExportError(error)`: Manages export failures.
       - **New**: `logError(error)`: Logs errors using a shared logger utility.
   - **Detailed Comments**:
     - Include file metadata at the top (purpose, path, author, date).
     - Add section comments (e.g., // --- Export Logic ---).
   - **Example Structure**:
     ```javascript
     /**
      * File: auctionExportUtils.js
      * Path: backend/utils/exportUtils/auctionExportUtils.js
      * Purpose: Exports analytics and bidding results to PDF, leveraging pdfExportService.js
      * Author: Cod5 (06050000)
      * Date: May 06, 2025
      * Cod2 Crown Certified
      */

     // --- Dependencies ---
     const pdfExportService = require('@utils/exportUtils/pdfExportService');
     const logger = require('@utils/logger');
     // Mock data (replace with actual implementation)
     const mockData = {
       getAuctionSummary: (auctionId) => ({
         auctionId,
         vehicle: 'Toyota Camry 2020',
         bids: [{ userId: 'user_001', amount: 5000 }]
       }),
       getLeaderboard: (auctionId) => ({
         auctionId,
         leaderboard: [{ userId: 'user_001', totalBids: 5 }]
       })
     };

     // --- Export Functions ---
     /**
      * generateAuctionSummaryPDF
      * Purpose: Creates PDF summary for an auction
      * Parameters:
      *   - auctionId: String, the auction ID
      * Returns: String, the PDF content
      */
     const generateAuctionSummaryPDF = async (auctionId) => {
       try {
         const summary = mockData.getAuctionSummary(auctionId);
         const pdf = await integrateWithPDFExportService(summary);
         addAIAnnotations(pdf);
         return pdf;
       } catch (error) {
         handleExportError(error);
         return null;
       }
     };

     /**
      * exportParticipantLeaderboard
      * Purpose: Exports leaderboard data
      * Parameters:
      *   - auctionId: String, the auction ID
      * Returns: Object, the leaderboard data
      */
     const exportParticipantLeaderboard = async (auctionId) => {
       try {
         return mockData.getLeaderboard(auctionId);
       } catch (error) {
         handleExportError(error);
         return null;
       }
     };

     /**
      * addAIAnnotations
      * Purpose: Adds AI insights to PDF
      * Parameters:
      *   - pdf: String, the PDF content
      * Returns: String, the annotated PDF
      */
     const addAIAnnotations = (pdf) => {
       return `${pdf} (AI Insight: High demand vehicle)`;
     };

     /**
      * integrateWithPDFExportService
      * Purpose: Uses pdfExportService.js for PDF generation
      * Parameters:
      *   - data: Object, the data to export
      * Returns: String, the PDF content
      */
     const integrateWithPDFExportService = async (data) => {
       return pdfExportService.generatePDF(data);
     };

     /**
      * handleExportError
      * Purpose: Manages export failures
      * Parameters:
      *   - error: Error object
      */
     const handleExportError = (error) => {
       logError(error);
       // Additional error handling logic (e.g., notify admin)
     };

     /**
      * logError
      * Purpose: Logs errors using a shared logger utility
      * Parameters:
      *   - error: Error object
      */
     const logError = (error) => {
       logger.error(`auctionExportUtils Error: ${error.message}`);
     };

     module.exports = {
       generateAuctionSummaryPDF,
       exportParticipantLeaderboard,
       addAIAnnotations,
       integrateWithPDFExportService
     };

     **Functions Summary**:
     - **generateAuctionSummaryPDF(auctionId)**
       - **Purpose**: Creates PDF summary for an auction.
       - **Inputs**: auctionId (String)
       - **Outputs**: String (PDF content)
       - **Dependencies**: pdfExportService.js, logger.js
     - **exportParticipantLeaderboard(auctionId)**
       - **Purpose**: Exports leaderboard data.
       - **Inputs**: auctionId (String)
       - **Outputs**: Object (leaderboard data)
       - **Dependencies**: logger.js
     - **addAIAnnotations(pdf)**
       - **Purpose**: Adds AI insights to PDF.
       - **Inputs**: pdf (String)
       - **Outputs**: String (annotated PDF)
       - **Dependencies**: None
     - **integrateWithPDFExportService(data)**
       - **Purpose**: Uses pdfExportService.js for PDF generation.
       - **Inputs**: data (Object)
       - **Outputs**: String (PDF content)
       - **Dependencies**: pdfExportService.js
     - **handleExportError(error)**
       - **Purpose**: Manages export failures.
       - **Inputs**: error (Error object)
       - **Outputs**: None (logs error)
       - **Dependencies**: logger.js
     - **logError(error)**
       - **Purpose**: Logs errors using a shared logger utility.
       - **Inputs**: error (Error object)
       - **Outputs**: None (logs to logger)
       - **Dependencies**: logger.js
AuctionModerationDashboard.jsx (Post-Launch)**:
File: AuctionModerationDashboard.jsx
Path: frontend/src/components/auction/AuctionModerationDashboard.jsx

Build a React component for admin monitoring of auctions, including fraud score visualization and moderator alerts.
Integrate with AIFraudDetection.js for fraud scores.
Add error logging for failed fraud detection.
Functions:
renderFraudHeatmap(): Displays fraud score visualization.
triggerModeratorAlert(): Sends alerts for anomalies.
integrateWithAIFraudDetection(): Uses AIFraudDetection.js for fraud scores.
New: logError(error): Logs errors using a shared logger utility.
Detailed Comments:

/**
 * File: AuctionModerationDashboard.jsx
 * Path: frontend/src/components/auction/AuctionModerationDashboard.jsx
 * Purpose: Admin view for monitoring auctions and flagging anomalies
 * Author: Cod5 (06050000)
 * Date: May 06, 2025
 * Cod2 Crown Certified
 */

// --- Dependencies ---
import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import axios from 'axios';
import logger from '@utils/logger';
// Mock AIFraudDetection (replace with actual implementation)
const AIFraudDetection = {
  getFraudScores: () => ({
    auctionId: 'auction_001',
    scores: [{ userId: 'user_001', score: 0.9 }]
  })
};

// --- Component Definition ---
/**
 * AuctionModerationDashboard Component
 * Purpose: Displays fraud scores and moderator alerts for auctions
 * Props:
 *   - auctionId: String, the auction ID
 * Returns: JSX element for the moderation dashboard
 */
const AuctionModerationDashboard = ({ auctionId }) => {
  // --- State Management ---
  const [fraudScores, setFraudScores] = useState(null);

  // --- Fraud Detection Logic ---
  /**
   * integrateWithAIFraudDetection
   * Purpose: Uses AIFraudDetection.js for fraud scores
   * Returns: Object with fraud scores
   */
  const integrateWithAIFraudDetection = async () => {
    try {
      const scores = await AIFraudDetection.getFraudScores(auctionId);
      setFraudScores(scores);
      return scores;
    } catch (error) {
      logError(error);
      return null;
    }
  };

  /**
   * renderFraudHeatmap
   * Purpose: Displays fraud score visualization
   * Returns: JSX element for the heatmap
   */
  const renderFraudHeatmap = () => {
    return (
      <div className="fraud-heatmap">
        {fraudScores?.scores.map((score) => (
          <div key={score.userId}>
            User: {score.userId}, Fraud Score: {score.score}
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>
    );
  };

  /**
   * triggerModeratorAlert
   * Purpose: Sends alerts for anomalies
   */
  const triggerModeratorAlert = () => {
    if (fraudScores?.scores.some((score) => score.score > 0.8)) {
      axios.post('/api/admin/alert', {
        message: `High fraud score detected in auction ${auctionId}`
      });
    }
  };

  /**
   * logError
   * Purpose: Logs errors using a shared logger utility
   * Parameters:
   *   - error: Error object
   */
  const logError = (error) => {
    logger.error(`AuctionModerationDashboard Error: ${error.message}`);
  };

  // --- Lifecycle Hooks ---
  useEffect(() => {
    integrateWithAIFraudDetection().then(() => triggerModeratorAlert());
  }, [auctionId]);

  // --- Main Render ---
  return (
    <div className="moderation-dashboard">
      <h3>Auction Moderation Dashboard</h3>
      {fraudScores && renderFraudHeatmap()}
    </div>
  );
};

export default AuctionModerationDashboard;

**Functions Summary**:
- **integrateWithAIFraudDetection()**
  - **Purpose**: Uses AIFraudDetection.js for fraud scores.
  - **Inputs**: None
  - **Outputs**: Object (fraud scores)
  - **Dependencies**: AIFraudDetection.js, axios, logger.js
- **renderFraudHeatmap()**
  - **Purpose**: Displays fraud score visualization.
  - **Inputs**: None
  - **Outputs**: JSX element
  - **Dependencies**: None
- **triggerModeratorAlert()**
  - **Purpose**: Sends alerts for anomalies.
  - **Inputs**: None
  - **Outputs**: None (sends alert)
  - **Dependencies**: axios
- **logError(error)**
  - **Purpose**: Logs errors using a shared logger utility.
  - **Inputs**: error (Error object)
  - **Outputs**: None (logs to logger)
  - **Dependencies**: logger.js
